common

Class AbstractImageParser

  • java.lang.Object
    • common.AbstractImageParser
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    HeifParser, JpgParser, PngParser, TifParser, WebpParser

    public abstract class AbstractImageParser
extends java.lang.Object
    An abstract base for image file parsers. Subclasses implement decoding logic for specific formats (e.g. JPEG, PNG, TIFF) to extract metadata structures.

    This class handles file validation and provides utilities for retrieving basic file system attributes and diagnostic information.

    Since:
    13 August 2025
    Version:
    1.0
    Author:
    Trevor Maggs

      Returns the detected image format, such as TIFF, PNG, or JPG.

      • imageFile

        private final java.nio.file.Path imageFile

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractImageParser

        public AbstractImageParser(java.nio.file.Path fpath)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Constructs an image parser and validates the target file.
        Parameters:
        fpath - the path to the image file
        Throws:
        java.lang.NullPointerException - if fpath is null
        java.io.IOException - if the file does not exist or is not a regular file

    • Method Detail

      • getImageFile

        public java.nio.file.Path getImageFile()
        Gets the image file path used for parsing.
        Returns:
        the image file Path

      • formatDiagnosticString

        public java.lang.String formatDiagnosticString()
                                        throws java.io.IOException
        Summarises basic file attributes and metadata status for diagnostics.
        Returns:
        a formatted string containing file metrics and detected formats
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if the file attributes cannot be read

      • formatExtensionErrorMessage

        protected java.lang.String formatExtensionErrorMessage()
        Formats an error message describing the incorrect extension of the file.
        Returns:
        the error message in a form of string

      • readMetadata

        public abstract boolean readMetadata()
                              throws java.io.IOException
        Extracts metadata from the image file.
        Returns:
        true if parsing was successful
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException - if a file reading error occurs during parsing

      • getMetadata

        public abstract Metadata<?> getMetadata()
        Retrieves the extracted metadata.
        Returns:
        the extracted Metadata container

      • getImageFormat

        public abstract DigitalSignature getImageFormat()
        Returns the detected image format, such as TIFF, PNG, or JPG.
        Returns:
        the DigitalSignature representing the image format
